name: Markel Group Inc.
description: Markel Group Inc. is a diverse holding company that operates a wide range of businesses across various industries. At its core is Markel Insurance, which provides capital to support growth and investment across the entire group. Beyond insurance, the company's majority-owned businesses span sectors ranging from industrial bakery equipment and building supplies to ornamental plants. Guided by the Markel Style, the company focuses on long-term success, financial conservatism, and empowering local leaders to maintain an entrepreneurial spirit while delivering stable, diverse cash flows for its shareholders.
